title: Senior Software Engineer - SAP India Capital India - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - SAP India Capital India - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? SAP India Capital India in Madurai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About SAP India Capital India:
SAP India Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SAP India Capital India!
